Name: Tradeasia International

Name: FAR EAST GROUP LIMITED
Description:
Founded in 1953 as one of the pioneers in the refrigeration and air-conditioning business in Singapore, Far East Group Limited (formerly known as Far East Refrigeration (Pte.) Limited) is a comprehensive provider of refrigeration and air-conditioning systems and products in the heating, ventilation, air-conditioning and refrigeration ("HVAC&R") industry. Our Directors believe that we are one of the leading regional distributors of commercial and light industrial refrigeration systems and products in the South-east Asia region.

Our Group has a broad customer base of more than 1,000 active customers, including distributors, dealers as well as refrigeration and air-conditioning contractors who use our products and services to provide comprehensive refrigeration and air-conditioning systems to endusers, such as supermarkets, cold store distribution centres, food processing and catering facilities, hotels, hospitals, food and beverage establishments, convenient stores, petrol stations, marine vessels, oil rigs and barges.

Besides sourcing and distributing agency products, our Group also manufactures our in-house "Eden" brand of heat exchangers and condensing units. In particular, our products are widely recognised and used by well-known international and regional retail chains such as Carrefour, Metro, Tesco, Giant, Cold Storage and NTUC FairPrice as well as Resorts World Sentosa and Marina Bay Sands.

Headquartered in Singapore, our Group has subsidiaries in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong as well as representative offices in Vietnam and Indonesia. We also have approximately 20 distributors and dealers in countries including Malaysia, Thailand, the Philippines, Myanmar, Mauritius, Vietnam, Sri Lanka and Indonesia.

In line with our growth, our Group's revenue rose from approximately S$29.2 million in FY2008 to approximately S$32.6 million in FY2010, while net profit rose from approximately S$1.0 million in FY2008 to approximately S$4.6 million in FY2010.

Name: YEM - Your Export Manager
Description:
We help businesses better promote and sell their products in countries it would otherwise be very difficult for them to reach and make a significant impact.

Our services are tailored specifically to small and medium enterprises that do not currently employ an export manager and want to tap into new markets without burdening their company's internal infrastructure at any given time.

We are an established and unique company with successful strategies to help our clients penetrate new markets, increase export activities and forge business relationships in Southeast Asia.
 
OUR HISTORY:
The history of YEM started in Italy in 2012, where our CEO & Founder was working alone with only three manufacturers. Today, from our Singapore HQ and our offices in Jakarta, Ho Chi Minh, Hanoi, Manila, Bangkok, and Kuala Lumpur, we work with and expand the business of the over 30 manufacturers in our portfolio. Over the last 20 years, we have developed a professional relationship with a large Distributors and System Integrators network.
 
OUR MISSION:
To be the fastest and most sustainable way to sell your products into Southeast Asia. We develop and execute marketing strategies to enhance your brand identity in new markets. All commercial actions are constantly analyzed by Chief Operating Officers, Country Managers, and Pre and After Sales Managers who conduct over 500 meetings and manage 2000 sales opportunities every month to help you increase brand awareness.

Name: Xpand Tradings Pte Ltd
Description:
Who We Are
Xpand Tradings is a trading & distribution company which focuses on distribution of FMCG F&B category products that satisfy the tagline “Quality with Convenience.” We seek out products from sources that do not compromise on quality, while giving value for money for every product we offer. 
Our strength is in seeking out ‘hidden gems’ from unconventional sources while ensuring. That the production practices they use maintains the integrity of good manufacturing practices, safety of the products & the quality. We focus on a range of products for the modern family, keeping in mind the challenges of the frantic pace of living in this modern world. 

Why should you choose us for your distribution needs?
We operate on a 3 R sourcing framework to ensure our partners and their products enjoy optimal market penetration and the best chance for maximum sales revenue.
We employ a 3R Framework approach in our client engagement. This unique framework allows us to keep an active level of engagement with our partners throughout our partnership. In turn, this active engagement helps us define our search for the type of products we distribute in line with our guiding philosophy. This is crucial to ensure the following:

A. For our Producer/ Manufacturer Partner
This framework allows them to access to real time data on what kind of market entry strategies will best work for their products. This allows optimum sharing and market intel so that both parties can choose wisely on everything from product range, pricing strategy and brand building initiatives. Clear marketing plans and costings can be derived from the collected data to optimise profits for both parties.

B. For our customers.
Whether it is for B2B or B2C customers, we bring in quality products and go the extra mile to bundle and package our products so that economies of scale can be enjoyed even in small orders. With certain conditions met, we can supply the high amount for the right price.

Name: VINOLIS CELLAR Pte Ltd
Description:
French, with a deep-rooted love for wine, had spent the last two decades immersed in the vibrant culture of Asia. His journey had taken him from bustling metropolises to serene countryside, where he discovered a growing appreciation for fine wines among the region's discerning consumers.

Inspired by this newfound passion, he decided to bridge the gap between the rich wine heritage of Europe & the “New World” and the burgeoning wine market of Asia. He envisioned a company that would introduce a curated selection of exceptional wines to Asian palates, while also promoting wine culture and education.

His extensive knowledge of wine, coupled with his deep understanding of Asian tastes, allowed him to curate a carefully selected portfolio of wines. From the classic regions of France, Spain and Portugal to emerging wine-producing countries like South Africa, Vinolis offers a diverse range of exceptional vintages.

Each wine was chosen for its quality, character, and suitability for Asian palates. He believes that wine should be an enjoyable experience, accessible to all, and he was committed to introducing wines that would resonate with Asian consumers.

Beyond simply selling wine, Vinolis aimed to promote wine culture and education in Asia. He organizes wine tastings, seminars, and workshops to introduce people to the world of wine and help them develop their palates. He believes that by fostering a love for wine, he could contribute to the growth of the wine market in Asia.

Vinolis became a bridge between the wine cultures of Europe and Asia. His passion and expertise, combined with his deep understanding of both cultures, allow him to connect wine producers with Asian consumers in a meaningful way. Vinolis is a trusted source for high-quality wines, and his vision of sharing his love of wine with Asia became a reality.

Description:

We are one of the preferred partner and supplier of various companies in need of low, medium to high voltages motors from simple to complicated operations. Our core strength is engineered-to-order motors and drives. 

We have significant experience in Power Conversion, Power Quality, Power Supply and Power Generation (particularly from renewable energy sources). Applying our experience in electric motor industry, we were able to find the best suppliers and manufacturers of robust, reliable and premium efficiency AC motors to deliver to our clients in the ASEAN region. Whatever your power needs, whether you are looking at installing new equipment or revamping existing facilities, we can design and deliver the best solution to optimise efficiency, contributing significantly to reducing energy costs. Name: Isula Flavours Of Corsica
Description:
Corsica is a mediterranean French Island quietly tucked between Provence and Tuscany, it is a hidden treasure of unspoiled charm and natural beauty. Also known as “île de beauté” (Beauty Island), what truly attracts visitors is the Corsican spirit - to be true to their heritage and way of life. These rich values are exemplified by Isula’s handcrafted products, each one thoughtfully crafted using decades of traditional know-how and homegrown harvest. With Isula, bring home an authentic taste of Corsica and be captivated by a new plethora of flavours, taste and natural goodness.

The cuisine of Corsica is well-known to foodies around the world for its originality and dishes made from locally-grown fresh with delicious Mediterranean ingredients. Some of the typical products found in Corsica include chestnuts, cheeses made exclusively with goat or sheep’s milk, high quality olive oil and alcohol such as wines, beers and liqueurs. Corsican charcuterie is considered as one of the best in the world.

Mobile Chemical Storage Modules
Offshore-Certified Modular Containers

Critical Infrastructure Hardening & Protection

Dust Explosion Protection
Spark Detection & Automatic Extinguishing
